meta.source_note: Steam 公开搜索页提供发售日期而非小时级发布时间；本报告按发售日期从新到旧选取最新条目。

items.title: FILENDS Demo
items.short_description: 《FILENDS》是一款暗黑风格的多人解谜游戏，支持2-7名玩家共同参与。玩家需通力合作，破解充满凶杀谜案与悲剧故事的关卡。通过环境线索与实时聊天功能，逐步揭开真相的面纱。你们究竟能解开谜题，还是会成为谜题的一部分？

items.title: Race! Then Retry...
items.short_description: A fast paced, difficult, arcade racing experience. Race through over 30 unique tracks as you try to survive and beat the clock.

items.title: World Order: Global Power Demo
items.short_description: Rule any nation in one of the most detailed geopolitical simulations ever created. Balance economics, diplomacy, military strategy, public opinion, and global power as you guide your country through an ever-changing world shaped by your decisions.

items.title: 天使之恋Online：国际版
items.short_description: 《天使之恋Online 国际版》是一款2D可爱奇幻风格的线上 MMORPG，主打高度自由的养成、多样玩法与跨国共玩体验，让新旧玩家都能轻松投入、长久游玩。可自由选择阵营、搭配技能来培养角色，创造出专属于个人的游戏风格。国际版更提供四倍速练等，加速角色成长，优化背包空间，让收集与探索更无负担。同时支援即时聊天翻译，可与全球玩家一同冒险。游戏装扮可由副本直接掉落，并追加分解、融合系统，将外观转化为实力。

items.title: 科提玛洛 Demo
items.short_description: 新的冒险已经出现，冒险的脚步怎能停滞不前，扮演你喜欢的角色，去赢取怪物守护的宝藏，你的每次键入都会为科提玛洛的世界带来新的希望与转机，去科提玛洛的世界里，书写永恒的冒险传说。

items.title: Illustack
items.short_description: 赛博迷幻风爬塔俄罗斯方块，微像素质感 + 多风格精良音乐+关卡轮换，用属于你的节奏叠出你的专属构筑在不同的境界中遨游，并最终登到最高点吧。

items.title: Magma Karta Demo
items.short_description: Magma Karta is a satisfying strategy card game with roguelite and gambling elements. The rules can switch at any turn, challenging you to adapt your builds and your playstyle.

items.title: Diamond-Die Demo
items.short_description: Diamond-Die is a baseball dice game where every at bat can turn into glory, disaster, or something pretty goofy.

items.title: EVIL Agribusiness Simulator Demo
items.short_description: Here at AGRO agribusiness we see the potential in anyone. So we decided to turn what we do into a video game. Teach them young and to believe in our brand and-wait that was the confidential part I wasn’t supposed to type. Oh, here it is- learn how to drive a forest destroying combine in 46 levels.

items.title: 再战大极品+255
items.short_description: 一款自由打装备免氪金的传奇对战游戏，以其独特的游戏玩法和丰富多样的内容，吸引了众多玩家的关注。在游戏中，你将进入一个充满挑战和竞争的世界，与其他玩家展开激烈的对战，争夺珍贵的装备和资源，成为传奇战士的最终王者。

items.title: 空跃之旅：像素天穹（SKY LEAP PIXEL SKY)
items.short_description: 空跃之旅：像素天穹 是一款可以1-4人合作挑战的 3D 像素跳跳乐休闲冒险游戏。在天空悬浮平台间跳跃闯关，体验多人联机、全球排行榜与全成就系统，有这各种具有挑战和神奇梦幻的挑战关卡，向着像素天穹之巅不断攀登。

items.title: Granblue Fantasy: Relink - Endless Ragnarok Demo
items.short_description: 【碧蓝幻想Relink 无尽黄昏 Demo 内容】 ※《碧蓝幻想Relink 无尽黄昏》免费版 可使用以下3种模式： 1.剧情模式 2.任务模式 3.教程模式

items.title: Reclaim Demo
items.short_description: Reclaim is a fantasy visual novel following a peculiar elf and a dying god trying to free the world and themselves. Choose wisely and help them study, create, and escape.

items.title: The Drylands Demo
items.short_description: The Drylands is a Car party-based RPG. Fight for loot and explore an ever-changing procedurally generated world as the shifting sands reveal lost secrets

items.title: 쌀먹의 시대 Demo
items.short_description: Age of Gold Farmers is a black comedy sim about a NEET youth surviving on in-game currency. After failing at life, he discovers "gold farming." Grind for items, track market prices, and grow your channel—all while dodging your parents' glares and managing your health.

items.title: ENDLESS SIGNAL
items.short_description: 可在屏幕角落游玩的放置刷宝射击游戏，享受高速成长与爽快养成的乐趣。

items.title: The Escape to the Afterlife | この世からの脱出
items.short_description: The Escape to the Afterlife is a short horror experience (about 1 hour) where a deceased protagonist searches for a path to the afterlife.

items.title: 白荣大学 0号馆
items.short_description: 『从大学地图上消失的校舍—0号馆』 白荣大学0号馆是一款以日本大学为舞台的废墟探索恐怖冒险游戏。 你将化身为灵异社团成员，前往禁止入内的「0号馆」进行采访。 在诡异的气氛中，0号馆的真相将逐渐浮出水面……究竟是什么？

items.title: らしん探偵録 CASE01 : 最後のページ Demo
items.short_description: A strange request leads a detective to the silent residence of a missing homeowner. Explore the house and solve the intricate puzzles scattered within to uncover the truth behind the disappearance. A quiet, first-person mystery adventure.

items.title: Crescent Creek Survival Demo
items.short_description: Crescent Creek: Survival Demo plunges you into a desolate farm, cut off from civilization and steeped in mystery. As you explore its winding corridors and ominous rooms, you’ll need to make critical choices, as each path could lead to salvation or peril.

items.title: MuteX+
items.short_description: MuteX+ is a challenging hack-and-slash that focuses on enemies that merge mid-fight. Make the most out of an unconventional moveset built around a slash, punch, and dash to cleave through the six Anobrite nests -- each ending with their own boss -- while mastering smooth mouse-controlled movement.

items.title: Tetrabeasts Demo
items.short_description: 在 Tetrabeasts 中指挥一支怪物战团，这款游戏是经典下落方块解谜与激烈战术怪物战斗的爆炸性融合。组建致命的战斗阵线，清除行以释放对敌方城堡的毁灭性攻击，并在无情的反击中生存。锻造你的军队。掌握方块。征服王国。

items.title: Rasek Demo
items.short_description: 在这款像素风动作MMORPG中，体验经典网络角色扮演游戏的辉煌与冒险。选择你的职业，自定义你的技能，加入氏族并肩作战或独自探索，以你自己的方式游玩，在拉塞克大陆上战斗，成为传奇。

items.title: Glimvale : My Mini Overworld
items.short_description: 《格林威尔》是一款融入了放置机制的温馨单人城市建造游戏。你可以管理、 装饰和发展一座迷人的多人在线游戏风小镇。 让冒险者们保持快乐， 按自己的节奏塑造这个世界。 作为这款游戏的GM， 这里由你说了算！

items.title: Mechanical Defense Line Demo
items.short_description: 这是一款塔防卡牌肉鸽游戏，可组装改装炮台、搭配装备挑战关卡、体验剧情。通过多种功能强化自身，战斗中选择不同天赋取胜，每次战斗可获得不少于 10 件装备，更多内容请在游戏内体验。

items.title: Eternal Decay Souls Demo
items.short_description: Explore a dark world filled with cursed creatures, solve ancient puzzles, and confront powerful bosses on a journey where each relic discovered reveals the secrets of eternal decay.

items.title: ALONE: Mnemophobia Demo
items.short_description: Play the prologue of ALONE: Mnemophobia. Face "The Presence" in a disturbing interrogation, survive the darkness that drains your sanity, and solve macabre puzzles in this psychological horror demo with a gritty VHS aesthetic.

items.title: Gravora
items.short_description: Tilt a 3D cube. Roll the ball. Find the path. Gravora is a physics-based puzzle game where gravity is your only tool and your greatest enemy. Use precise controls or your own hand via camera tracking to manipulate the world in real time.

items.title: Captain Corgi: Planetary Problem Solver Demo
items.short_description: Hop aboard your cosmic sailboat and seek out folks in need of help in this storybook universe.

items.title: VectorSmash!
items.short_description: VectorSmash is a fast-paced retro arcade space shooter. Pilot your artillery battery to defend the planet, blasting waves of incoming meteorites and using warps to survive. Classic 80s action with crisp vector visuals, simple controls, and addictive high-score chasing!

items.title: Trail of Gods: The Cursed Island
items.short_description: A compact, cursed action RPG that lingers long after you put it down. Fight through a dying world armed only with precise timing and whatever gear you can scavenge from the fallen. One button + movement is all you need.

items.title: Wild Climbers Peak Panic
items.short_description: Get ready for absolute chaos in Wild Climbers: Peak Panic! Battle it out in fast-paced 2-10 player online matches where you have just 3 minutes to reach the summit. Dodge crazy obstacles, outsmart your rivals, and survive the hilarious madness to become the ultimate climbing champion!

items.title: How Much Is ?
items.short_description: Test your math skills in an exciting FPS! Find the correct door to move forward. 100 islands await you with addition, subtraction, division, and multiplication. Hurry, the clock is ticking, and watch outeach island holds new challenges.

items.title: Bee Streamer Idler
items.short_description: Bee Streamer Idler 是一个为主播设计的叠加层！通过把聊天观众变成蜜蜂来增强互动，一起收集花粉并建造蜂巢！聊天观众通过指令控制自己的蜜蜂。看看你们能一起收集多少蜂蜜！赚取足够资源来解锁所有升级！

items.title: Beat The Markets
items.short_description: 一款基于金融的数字棋盘游戏，以围绕股票市场的真实投资策略为基础。

items.title: LiTTLE SYMBiO Demo
items.short_description: Be the (un-)natural Selection! In this cozy little Action Arcade game you play as a giant alien trying to survive on a little planet alongside even smaller ones. They get on your nerves? Just slap them off the planet! But be careful, you need them as much as they need you...

items.title: Not My Son Demo
items.short_description: A psychological horror game where a stepfather is left alone with a disturbing child. Explore a quiet house, face growing nightmares, and piece together the truth behind the boy’s behavior.

items.title: Knight Paths Demo
items.short_description: A minimalist battle of movement, memory, and mind. Inspired by the timeless strategy of Chess, Knight Paths distills tactical gameplay to its purest form. Two players. One knight each. No second chances.

items.title: Gloria Victis: Medieval MMORPG
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 754 篇用户评测中有 68% 为好评。 此产品的总体评价是基于您的偏好用以您语言撰写的评测计算得出的。
items.short_description: 《Gloria Victis》是一款侧重真实性的开放世界大型多人在线角色扮演游戏，背景设定为略带魔幻风格的中世纪。本游戏战斗系统无目标锁定机制，依赖玩家操作，玩家可在开放式的PVP战斗中争夺领土控制权。游戏的制造系统有深度而无所不包，经济系统由玩家主导，剧情成熟而宏大，画面写实而绚丽，向玩家呈现沉浸式的游戏体验。 游戏有两大阵营：居住在大草原上的自豪的中土人，以及住在寒冷北方又复仇心切的伊斯米尔人。玩家将选择一方加入，然后奔赴战场！

items.title: Backrooms Lost Runners
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 68 篇用户评测中有 89% 为好评。
items.short_description: Backrooms Lost Runners 是一款合作生存恐怖游戏，拥有团队玩法、语音反应 AI 和沉浸式谜题。这不是“散步模拟器”：探索边缘空间，智胜实体，并记住——即使是耳语也可能暴露你。

items.title: Prologue: Go Wayback!
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 293 篇用户评测中有 69% 为好评。
items.short_description: Prologue: Go Wayback! is a single-player open-world emergent survival roguelike where every journey is unique. Traverse a new wilderness that is generated for you every time you play. Chart your path, overcome the elements, and write your own story of exploration.

items.title: SWAPMEAT
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 140 篇用户评测中有 90% 为好评。
items.short_description: Rip through hostile alien worlds, harvest mutant body parts mid-combat, and adapt faster than your enemies. Every alien you harvest gives you new body parts with unique powers, like triple-jump legs, turret-dropping torsos, grenade-launching turkey heads. Steal, swap, survive.

items.title: Arcade Architect
items.short_description: Build and run your own retro arcade—where every machine is fully playable. Design your layout, master the games, and grow your neon empire.

items.title: Melon Clicker
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 46 篇用户评测中有 41% 为好评。
items.short_description: Click the melon to accumulate points. Ideal for short breaks or unwinding.

items.title: Gridfire Demo
items.short_description: A top-down shooter with action packed PvP combat. In the full game, engage in FFA or team based combat with game modes like capture the flag, control points, or team deathmatch. In this demo, you can play CTF to to get a taste of Gridfire. If you enjoy it, please give the full game a try.

items.title: Potions & Passions: Therapist for Monsters Demo
items.short_description: Manage your spooky potion shop and meet monsters! Solve the tragicomic problems of vampires, werewolves, ifrits and trolls, or pit them against each other. Scavenge ingredients, craft volatile brews, and enjoy this chaotic management simulation!

items.title: Galactic Patrol
items.short_description: A lost 1998 arcade-style shooter returns! Fight through 25 levels and 300+ waves of alien attacks inspired by classic shoot-'em-ups like Space Invaders and Galaga, featuring top-down, side-scrolling, and rear-view gameplay.

items.title: Firedrip Arcade
items.short_description: A collection of 4 arcade games to help scratch that nostalgic itch.

items.title: Blades of Four Demo
items.short_description: A fast-paced fantasy action roguelike where 4 unique heroes battle through dangerous maps, unlock powerful items, and master devastating abilities with swords and bows

items.title: Crustacean Station! Demo
items.short_description: Work a day job at Crustacean Station checking identification and sending a vibrant cast of sea creatures to their desired destinations!

items.title: Void Signal Demo
items.short_description: An immersive sci-fi space shooter where you pilot a ship through an anomalously expanding region of space. Analyze real-time scientific data, survive encounters with mysterious alien entities, make ethical decisions, and uncover hidden truths as the universe around you transforms.

items.title: goblinAmerica
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 34 篇用户评测中有 94% 为好评。
items.short_description: 这是一款快节奏的枪战类游戏，背景设定在一个低级的地精化美国。占有妖精总统，获得黄太阳的美丽勋章，让自己迷失在鲜艳的生活色彩中。

items.title: HeartCore Descent
items.short_description: Fly to the center of the planet to destroy its core! A simple yet challenging 2D Precision Platformer Indie game about flying a rocketship through various terrains, progressively getting harder and harder.

items.title: Incense Nook
items.short_description: 在桌面角落经营一座小香炉，插香、燃烧、收集香火，慢慢解锁新炉与新香。

items.title: STROZOWKA
items.short_description: Operate the gate, let the cars in, and make sure the generator doesn’t die before dawn. People park here because it's cheap, but it’s their fuel that keeps your generator running. No cars means no fuel. No fuel means total darkness and trust me, you don’t want to be here when the lights go out.

items.title: Bind
items.short_description: BIND is a slow-paced metaphysical puzzle journey set in the liminal realm between death and rebirth.

items.title: Burger Bots Inc.
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 90 篇用户评测中有 93% 为好评。
items.short_description: An online co-op burger flipping game with scary and strange customers that you shouldn't anger.

items.title: Not Quite Dead: Open World Survival Demo
items.short_description: Open world zombie survival Coop game with base building, looting, crafting, vehicles, and exploration.

items.title: The Lost Within Demo
items.short_description: A paranormal investigator enters an ancient forest shrouded in rumors of a mad woman. In this first-person horror, players explore dark thickets for clues and hidden evidence. Solving atmospheric puzzles reveals the truth as the boundary between sanity and madness collapses.

items.title: G-MODEアーカイブス+ パックマン
items.short_description: The timeless masterpiece that has taken the world by storm is here! Eating all Pac-Dots while dodging the ghosts!

items.title: Brazzante Demo
items.short_description: Featuring a unique doodle aesthetic, this world is entirely hand-drawn. Your goal? Use classic 'Rock, Paper, Scissors' mechanics to survive never-ending rounds.

items.title: Retro Clicker
items.short_description: Retro Clicker — simple idle clicker with retro style. Destroy enemies, upgrade stats, use prestige for permanent power-ups, and enjoy endless perks & progression.

items.title: Neon Shifter Demo
items.short_description: A high-speed arcade racer where road rage fuels chaos. Smash traffic, build boost, and tear through neon highways in this Savlonic-powered thrill ride.

items.title: 最终夺回小分队
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 46 篇用户评测中有 95% 为好评。
items.short_description: 『最终夺回小分队』是一款2.5D单人FPS游戏。你将面对与早期SF作品中常见的外星武器极为酷似的敌人，与它们展开激烈交锋。

items.title: Rocinha Wars
items.short_description: Um jogo de guerra urbana ambientado na América Latina.

items.title: PixelBoss: Shattered Depths
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 36 篇用户评测中有 86% 为好评。
items.short_description: PixelBoss: Shattered Depths 是一款硬核 2D 像素风平台游戏，每一次失误都至关重要。战斗、躲避陷阱，并通过考验精准操作、反应速度和沉着判断的关卡。

items.title: Blockmind
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 27 篇用户评测中有 85% 为好评。
items.short_description: 在方块世界中解决空间谜题。找到形状背后的逻辑，并搭建出完美解法。

items.title: A Good Deed On Harris Avenue Demo
items.short_description: 在这款简短的PSX风格解谜冒险游戏中，理清哈里斯大道居民们错综复杂的愿望与期许。沐浴在夏日午后的灼热阳光下，探索精心打造的复杂环境，并揭开《哈里斯大道上的善举》所蕴含的深意。

items.title: Deep Enough
items.short_description: Dig deep, discover rare ores, upgrade your gear, and uncover the mysteries hidden beneath the surface in this cozy first-person mining adventure.

items.title: Chemicalizer Demo
items.short_description: Chemicalizer is a music game that you play on your PC using your smartphone (Android) as a controller.

items.title: Total Simp Death
items.short_description: You're a waifu just trying to get by, eating burgers to get thicker. The simps keep coming but you have your trusty rocket launcher.

items.title: Myth Requiem
items.short_description: Myth Requiem is a mythology RPG with idle and auto-battle mechanics. Lead legendary heroes like Ulysses and Sun Wukong, explore ancient realms, and build a living bestiary by capturing, battling, and cataloging hundreds of legendary creatures in a story-driven quest for divine power.

items.title: Slipspace Panic
items.short_description: A trip through slipspace gone awry. Shoot and evade waves of attackers for your freedom in this twin-stick shooter micro-game!

items.title: Grand Vegas Casino
items.short_description: 觉得自己幸运吗？踏入 Grand Vegas Casino，挑战世界上最受欢迎的四种赌博游戏，无需盛装打扮或担心钱包！Grand Vegas Casino 是一款休闲赌博模拟游戏，适合各种程度的玩家，提供直觉式操作与流畅的 HD-2D 动画风格，让你沉浸在奢华的高额投注氛围中。

items.title: Slot Shogun
items.short_description: Roll deadly Combat Arts and slash your way to the title of the new Shogun in this slot-based samurai swordplay roguelike.

items.title: Astral Archive Demo
items.short_description: Astral Archive is a short, incremental idle + space shooter hybrid where you collect space artifacts to grow a powerful archive!

items.title: Rebirth: Denied Protocol Demo
items.short_description: Trapped inside a failed resurrection experiment, a cop must survive grotesque creatures and uncover the truth behind a mad doctor’s obsession in this PS1-style survival horror with fixed cameras and tank controls.

items.title: Chess Flicks
items.short_description: Chess meets billiards. Flick your pieces like a cue stick — aim, pull back, and launch. Every collision counts. Can you knock the opponent's king off the board?

items.title: EDIFICE Demo
items.short_description: A sudden quarantine leaves you stranded within a forgotten sector of the Edifice, a decaying megastructure sheltering the last remnants of mankind. Scavenge whatever equipment you can get your hands on and venture deep into the sector's crumbling facilities to escape.

items.title: Mahjuro
items.short_description: Mahjuro is a mahjong roguelite deckbuilder inspired by Balatro, set inside a House that does not play fair. Draw tiles, form melds, then cash in your growing structure for scores that climb from careful clears to impossible numbers.

items.title: Cricket Management Tycoon
items.short_description: Build a T20 franchise from scratch. Sign players, set tactics, manage every ball, and compete across global leagues — with real board pressure, press conferences, and consequences every season.

items.title: Crisis R
items.short_description: CRISIS R is a fast pace side-scrolling shooter drawing inspirations from 16-bit era classics but with modern 3d graphics and effects. Game play revolves around straightforward control against fast pace missions with challenging mecha boss fights.

items.title: 牛仔很忙：西部割草者
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 15 篇用户评测中有 93% 为好评。
items.short_description: 轻松上手的幸存者like弹幕射击游戏，西部牛仔大战僵尸狂潮！各类武器流派：飞刀（高频连击）、战刀（防御生存）、榴弹（范围爆炸）、激光（持续输出）、自动炮台（解放双手）、电磁炮（终极装备）。搭配补给技能与被动技能，融合出终极超级技能。每局10分钟，随机肉鸽构筑，刷SSR装备，点天赋树，永久成长。零惩罚重开，解压割草，爽到停不下来！

items.title: 别让猛鬼靠近我
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 22 篇用户评测中有 86% 为好评。
items.short_description: 轻度肉鸽（Roguelite）生存射击塔防游戏，融合防守与构筑玩法，在丧尸猛鬼的末日中守护基地，随机技能组合+宝石合成进化，打造专属Build。防守基地、击退丧尸猛鬼，每局5分钟快节奏战斗。幻灵协同、枪械进化、角色天赋三重养成，高重玩价值。轻度策略，硬核爽感，单局5分钟，低门槛高上限，失败快速重开，每一局都是全新体验！

items.title: 你好,小绿
items.short_description: 这是一款2D平台冒险策略游戏。在层层关卡中，你是否可以登上山顶，我期待你的表现。 游戏中有不少可交互道具，奇遇和祝福可以让你变得更强，合理使用背包中的物品，合理的策略和高超的技术能让你登上顶峰，实现完全胜利。

items.title: BreakDespair2D Demo
items.short_description: Enjoy mining, upgrades, and explosive growth in this all-directional scrolling shooter. Auto-upgrades allow idle play, with no time limits or game overs. Defaults work fine, story scenes can be skipped, 20 weapons unlock later, and levels can reach 900 million.

items.title: Spellogger Demo
items.short_description: The first ever life-sim RPG where you play as a Wizard Lumberjack! Fell trees with your axe and magic. Explore a quiet world full of secrets, help villagers with their troubles, and steadily grow stronger as you gather resources and take down more trees.

items.title: OSAKANA PING PONG
items.short_description: 击打冰球，狠狠送进对手球门！由鱼群组成的 3D 球场上的在线 1v1 气垫冰球对战。

items.title: Suck Game For Friend
items.short_description: 'Suck Game For Friend' is a hardcore 2D platformer that demands absolute precision and embraces intentional clunkiness. Free of complex storylines or tutorials, the game relies entirely on your raw mechanical skill to reach the top.

items.title: 异能小猪
items.short_description: 《异能小猪》是一款末日题材互动影游。玩家化身异变后变成粉色小猪的主角方天明，觉醒顶级吞噬异能，在怪物降临的末世绝境中求生。游戏以影视化剧情演绎为主，全程关键节点由玩家自由抉择，每一次选择都会影响剧情走向、人物生死与阵营立场。你将邂逅雷翼御姐、治愈少女等伙伴，迎战反派小队与四大 S 级魔王，经历复仇、守护妹妹、集齐魔王核心的宿命之旅。多分支剧情解锁多重结局，是守护至亲坚守本心，还是被力量吞噬堕入黑暗，全由你的选择决定。

items.title: 军火修仙
items.short_description: 《军火修仙》是一款修仙题材互动影游，玩家穿越修真界化身凡人老祖林凡，坐拥全能军火系统与海量现代军火库。从沙漠之鹰、加特林到歼星炮、高达、核潜艇、奥特光线等跨次元武器随心解锁。游戏以真人影像剧情演绎，全程分支选项自由抉择，你的每一次选择都将改写剧情走向，解锁打脸魔教、收服正道尊神、迎战魔神、滞留修真界或穿越回归现代等多重结局。融合爽文打脸、轻喜冒险、修仙乱斗玩法，用科技军火碾压传统修真，沉浸式体验扛着军火称霸修仙界的逆天之旅。

items.title: 诡村遗墓
items.short_description: 《诡村遗墓》沉浸式互动影游，玩家化身快递小哥张不二，因故重返诡异古村，深陷古墓秘事、灵异诡事与道门纷争。全程影视实景演绎，玩家在关键剧情节点做出抉择，每一次选择都将改变剧情走向，解锁多重分支剧情与不同结局。你将邂逅神秘狐妖姬灵、正邪难辨的道长与诡异村民，揭开商纣王人皇遗墓、半块玉佩密钥、三教派夺气运的惊天秘密，在灵异幻境与生死博弈中，决定自身命运、村民魂魄与人皇气运的最终归宿。

items.title: 海賊物語
items.short_description: A SRPG where Flora, the young leader of the small outlaw group “Barrel-berry clan” fights to rebuild her struggling band alongside her companions.

items.title: Vektor Chess
items.short_description: Four-dimensional chess, rendered in three-dimensional space. Move pieces across a board eight layers deep, shift their phase between Small, Regular, and Large along a hidden fourth axis, and capture only when position and state align. Play solo, locally, or online.

items.title: PoopooDino
items.short_description: 想养一只沙雕小宠物住在你的桌面上吗？PoopooDino 绝对是你的最佳搭子！ 它会跟你互动、等你投喂、陪你一起长大，甚至能帮你寄信、把小惊喜送到朋友的桌面上 >< 就像住在桌面里的小精灵，悄悄拉近你和朋友的距离，工作时也默默陪着你～ 还内置番茄钟等实用小工具，PoopooDino 一定是你桌面上最靠谱的伙伴 !!

items.title: 我与你共度的七日
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 154 篇用户评测中有 94% 为好评。
items.short_description: 与囚禁自己的迷之少女，在陌生的房间中共度七日。

items.title: Collective Corp
items.short_description: In Collective Corp, your job is to collect as MANY artifacts as you can without dying! IN VERY EARLY DEVELOPMENT.

items.title: Let Rat Be Demo
items.short_description: 同时按下键盘上的大量按键，帮助小老鼠逃出去吧！

items.title: Kooeh: A Timeless Delight
items.short_description: Kooeh: A Timeless Delight is a heartwarming cosy narrative-driven restaurant management game about rediscovering lost family recipes and reviving the family restaurant.

items.title: Spheromania Demo
items.short_description: Bounce, blast, and outlast in Spheromania. A fast-paced arena shooter where drones duel with blasters, mines, and mid-air hops. Manage your energy, dodge the shrinking arena, and be the last sphere hovering. Solo mode or online multiplayer.

items.title: Going Once!
items.short_description: Going Once! is a cozy art gallery / auction house management game. Appraise and buy art, display it in your gallery and auction it off to the highest bidder!

items.title: Roses In Concrete Demo
items.short_description: Inspired by a famous poem from a legendary deceased American rapper, Roses In Concrete is an exercise in distilling a literary work into gameplay mechanics that reinforce its core message.

items.title: 太吾绘卷：天幕心帷
items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 48,725 篇用户评测中有 70% 为好评。 此产品的总体评价是基于您的偏好用以您语言撰写的评测计算得出的。
items.short_description: 《太吾绘卷》是一款以神话和武侠为题材的独立游戏。玩家将扮演神秘的“太吾氏传人”，在以古代中华神州为背景的架空世界中，通过一代又一代传人的努力和牺牲，最终击败强大的宿敌，决定人世的命运。

items.title: Incremental Ragebait
items.short_description: 一款受《Nodebuster》启发、轻松休闲的增量式游戏。拖动凡人来激怒他们，夺取他们的灵魂。 购买新武器。解锁升级。建造炼狱。激怒上帝。

items.title: Expedition Idle Demo
items.short_description: An idle auto-battler ARPG where you create one-of-a-kind items with crafting materials you pick up from the ground, customize your adventurers with different abilities and stats, and strategize your way through difficult bosses, unique scenarios, and dynamic monsters!

items.title: 陋室与猫 Demo
items.short_description: 《陋室与猫》是一款放置玩法的暖心小游戏。风雨交加的夜晚，你在一间破旧屋子里遇见了流浪猫们。你可以什么都不做，只是听雨、休息、听猫咪打呼噜；也可以拿起刷子帮它们清理毛发——刷下的毛团，就是它们给你的报酬。用这些毛团，把这间破屋子一点点变得温馨。每只猫都有真实的流浪故事，我边画边哭。希望它们，也能触动你。

items.title: Nacho Chihuahua: The Movie: The Game
items.short_description: Join Nacho as he pursues his true destiny: to return to his homeland, South of the Border!

items.title: Fast Lap Racing Demo
items.short_description: In Fast Lap Racing, you drive street cars on challenging tracks, improve your car’s performance, customize its look, and compete for positions on global leaderboards for each circuit and layout.

items.title: Null Hørizøn
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 17 篇用户评测中有 94% 为好评。
items.short_description: Survive the void in Null Hørizøn. Trade, fight, and explore a retro-futuristic 3D galaxy with 2D sprites. Upgrade your ship, smuggle goods, and travel across the universe. Tactical Real-Time combat meets Grid-based exploration in this atmospheric space sim. The Null Hørizøn calls, Captain.

items.title: God For A Day
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 37 篇用户评测中有 56% 为好评。
items.short_description: 在这款叙事型模拟游戏中，您扮演上帝之子。您的使命：决定、祝福或谴责城市居民。在做出决策之前，通过他们的物品和秘密揭示他们的故事。您的选择将改变城市的命运，并影响您在审判日的启示。

items.title: DEATH PENALTY Demo
items.short_description: YOU ARE SENTENCED TO DEATH... Slither your way through an impenetrable fortress crawling with devils faster, stronger, and more cunning than any human. By sheer luck you've slipped through the cracks, but discovery means certain death. How long are you going to delay the inevitable?

items.title: GobboQuestIdle
items.short_description: Help Gobbo escape a mysterious cave, grow stronger, collect pets, fight strange bosses, fish, farm, mine, craft, upgrade gear, and continue the adventure in an endless fantasy world.

items.title: [Room Escape] April First
items.short_description: This is an escape room game. Recommended for players who have experienced at least 30 escape rooms.

items.title: ME_iON
items.short_description: ME_iON is an online multiplayer shooter game with offline base-building mechanics, that's weird wacky and funny there are also funny little watermelons with banana guns so what's not to love about that :D

items.title: Uncle Otto's Mansion
items.short_description: You play as Audrey, who has just inherited a mansion from an uncle she never met. Step inside and explore the mansion to unveil the story of what happened to your uncle Otto, his butler, and this kinda creepy place. 😬

items.title: Future Fab Heroes Demo
items.short_description: Future Fab Hero, your mission begins now! Team up with your robot companion, CHIP-E, to complete hands-on technology and manufacturing simulations, earn rewards, unlock upgrades, and defend the Mars Innovation Zone from alien threats in a unique educational adventure.

items.title: Blightsilver Demo
items.short_description: Dark urban fantasy + hidden-grid strategy card game. Investigate liminal places. Duel on a secret 5×5 board where every face-down cards might be a lie. Nex Crowmont—a university nobody—is pulled into a conspiracy beneath ordinary life.

items.title: 骰途地牢 Demo
items.short_description: 骰途地牢》是一款 Roguelike 骰子构筑地牢探险游戏。你将深入程序化生成的地牢，在节点地图上规划路线，遭遇战斗、补给、成长与随机事件。战斗中投掷、重掷并分配骰面，用剑、心、火、冰、雷、星等元素组合满足技能门槛，释放职业专属招式；战后从奖励中挑选新骰、遗物与刻印，逐步强化骰袋与技能板。部分探索分支设有骰子门槛，掷出指定组合才能解锁更丰厚回报，每一步选择都影响本局资源与风险，每局皆是不同构筑。

items.title: if you stay demo
items.short_description: Winter 1999. Kicked out of your house after being outed by your closest friend, you plan to leave your hometown. Your girlfriend, Mika, wants to see you one more time. Decide whether or not you'll stay together.

items.title: Backrooms Lost Dimension
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 13 篇用户评测中有 46% 为好评。
items.short_description: Backrooms: Lost Dimension is a single-player horror game with puzzles, survival, and an original story. Explore mysterious levels, journey through unknown dimensions, and uncover hidden secrets along the way. Play the first chapter for free and continue the adventure by unlocking the next ones.

items.title: KYRO Demo
items.short_description: In this 30-45 minute demo, play as Aiden. Explore the Forest of Ka'a, solve puzzles to uncover ancient ruins, and use your slingshot and the KYRO system to conquer early bosses in this top-down, pixel art action-adventure prologue.

items.title: PolyDogfight Demo
items.short_description: Prepare to Fly, Dodge, Shoot, and Destroy in PolyDogfight. Unlock all the planes and maps to find your style. Obliterate waves of planes in an open-air arena as quickly as possible to get the high score and top the global leaderboard!

items.title: Mystery of Prophecy Demo
items.short_description: Myst of Proph is a pixel art Metroidvania based on biblical prophecies, health, and parkour.

items.title: Meowtabolism - Examining Feline Behavior within Unicellular Algae
items.short_description: 化身猫咪，在藻类细胞中展开冒险。探索微观尺度下的广大世界。

items.title: HypnoTiles
items.short_description: HypnoTiles is a puzzle game of the falling blocks variety. Its psychedelic graphics, hypnotic soundtrack and absorbing gameplay put the player in an almost trance-like state. Features 3 game modes and online highscores.

items.title: LIMICORE Demo
items.short_description: LIMICORE is a dark and narratively driven experience containing uncovered mysteries. Traverse the world through various realities and solve engaging puzzles to discover the truth behind the organization's objectives.

items.title: Life Core Demo
items.short_description: Life Core 是一款探索未知星球的 Roguelite 动作游戏。战斗吧，消灭你的敌人！当你倒下时，在新躯体中释放“核心”的力量。但请记住……系统时刻在注视着你！

items.title: Icaria
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 57 篇用户评测中有 91% 为好评。
items.short_description: Icaria is a robot colony builder where everything can be programmed. Build factories, design logistic networks, terraform the landscape, and explore an unknown alien world.

items.title: Fibula Demo
items.short_description: Embark on a dark fantasy action RPG adventure alone or with friends. Master combat and magic, explore dangerous dungeons, build a home, and create your own path through the world of Fibula.

items.title: Infinium
items.short_description: Discover a new adventure with every playthrough in this unique fantasy RPG. Every choice matters as you uncover what secrets Infinium is hiding. Will you become a daring adventurer or a rich mogul?

items.title: Lockdown
items.short_description: A short vehicle driving horror game

items.title: LucidDynamics
items.short_description: Welcome to LucidDynamics, a company where everything is confidential. Analyze and validate audio files without asking questions. But the further you go, the more anomalies appear and reality begins to distort. What is this company really hiding?

items.title: Directive: Intercept Demo
items.short_description: Protect Earth's last cities from an alien fleet in fast-paced aerial combat. Upgrade and customize your aircraft to dominate the skies.

items.title: Karting4Fun
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 18 篇用户评测中有 83% 为好评。
items.short_description: Jump into a race full of adrenaline, sharp turns, and wild contact. Bumping and shoving opponents is not only allowed—it’s encouraged!

items.title: TOTAL DRIFTIN': Touge Dreams
items.short_description: Master each corner, burn rubber, and become a legend high in the Japanese mountains. Total Driftin’: Touge Dreams is a tribute to classic '90s drifting, with precise arcade physics, retro aesthetics, and a cult-like soul. Do you have what it takes to become a touge god?

items.title: Sumo Fumble: Physics Party Demo
items.short_description: 《Sumo Fumble》是一款搞笑的本地多人物理派对游戏。抓住对手，将他们举起并扔进各种疯狂陷阱，或者扒掉他们的裤子博君一笑。在不断变化的竞技场中跌跌撞撞，一路翻滚迈向胜利！

items.title: Daughter of the Rift
items.short_description: Daughter of the Rift is story-rich card-battling adventure with an RPG-like deck-based upgrade system.

items.title: Best Streamer Demo
items.short_description: 这里是为您翻译的简体中文版本，同样保持了紧凑、吸睛的宣传风格： 一款残酷的主播模拟游戏，在这里，为了登顶你将不择手段。你可以通过优质内容合法搞钱，也可以用武器直接抹除竞争对手。管理生存需求，动用非法手段碾压同行，躲避警方追捕，最终成为全球第一的主播 !

items.title: Chaos Dice Survival
items.short_description: 8 characters clash on a 5x5 map! A unique simultaneous turn-based survival board game where dice decide your fate upon contact. Survive the chaos and become the ultimate champion!

items.title: Atelier's Key
items.short_description: Atelier's Key is a dark-fantasy FPS set in a root-bound Victorian world inhabited by puppets. Severed from a hivemind and armed with a mysterious weapon; shoot, grapple, and unlock your way through this world to save a Father from his own damned creation.

items.title: Trail & Error
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 12 篇用户评测中有 83% 为好评。
items.short_description: A chaotic co-op survival game for 1–4 players where you travel the trail, manage supplies, survive disasters, and argue with friends. Work together to keep the wagon moving, adapt to random events, and try to make it to the end in one piece.

items.title: Super Money Ring Demo
items.short_description: A twist on the classic Super Monkey Ball series, this time with a ring. Race ghosts and compete on the online leaderboard for the fastest time on any of the 100 carefully crafted levels.

items.title: .VXE Demo
items.short_description: 化身觉醒的恶意软件“矢量领主”，在这款散发着90年代微电子美学的高能动作肉鸽游戏中大开杀戒！体验零摩擦的极速高压战斗，通过主板与实体电路板硬核改装你的副手武器。你不是来拯救这个数字世界的，你是来把它彻底格式化的！

items.title: City Car Driving 2.0
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 431 篇用户评测中有 58% 为好评。
items.short_description: City Car Driving 2.0 is a driving simulator designed to help novice drivers master driving in a setting as close to reality as possible.

items.title: Downer Management
items.short_description: DOWNER MANAGEMENT is a 3-vs-3 autobattler set inside a corporate purgatory where every conflict is resolved through positional politics. Promote, demote, file, transfer, and stamp your way through Department of Management Division III. Forms in triplicate. No overtime. Termination is permanent.

items.title: 格阵工坊
items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 18 篇用户评测中有 72% 为好评。
items.short_description: 《格阵工坊》是一款结合 8×8 棋盘佈局与卡牌构筑的策略对战游戏。每一场对局不只是出牌，更是站位、时机与资源分配的精准博弈。 你需要在有限资源下选择落点与出牌顺序：是提前佈局，还是直接压制？每一次部署都会改变棋盘局势。透过构筑与操作累积优势，最终击败对手。

items.title: Cube Kingdoms
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 16 篇用户评测中有 93% 为好评。
items.short_description: 你将在一个奇幻世界里建立属于你的中世纪定居点，不断经营经济，壮大防线，迎战地精、亡灵、恶魔和史诗级Boss怪物，用自动战斗，将一切来犯之敌悉数击溃！

items.title: SOLID STATE HIVE Demo
items.short_description: Solid State Hive is a turn-based "JRPG" inspired adventure, wherein stealth may be used to sneak up on enemies or avoid them altogether and solve various types of puzzles.

items.title: 颅骨战争：测试场
items.short_description: 提供了基本全面的试玩版本

items.title: Mall Simulator Together Demo (Single Player)
items.short_description: Manage your own shopping mall, open new stores, organize deliveries, hire employees, and keep customers happy. This single-player demo offers a first look at the core mechanics of the full mall management experience.

items.title: Pokerist™ 的 8 Ball
items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 14 篇用户评测中有 78% 为好评。
items.short_description: 体验具有绝美画面的最逼真台球游戏！与来自世界各地的数百万玩家一起免费畅玩！

items.title: SongSurfer
items.short_description: SongSurfer is a simple and relaxing rhythm experience where you control a small airplane using your mouse as it glides along a dynamic music-generated track.

items.title: Riftbound Survivors Demo
items.short_description: 《Riftbound》是一款主打法术组合与海量敌袭的类幸存者弹幕天堂游戏。消灭成千上万的敌人，尝试元素连锁反应，利用叠加的状态效果打破游戏平衡。支持单人单机或双人联机。

items.title: COPA CITY
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 87 篇用户评测中有 57% 为好评。
items.short_description: COPA CITY《足球大亨》 ：首款让你化身顶级足球赛事组织者的游戏。不是教练，也不是球员，而是幕后全局的掌控者。你的荣耀之路，从哨声未响时就已开启！

items.title: Lost Exit Demo
items.short_description: A first-person psychological horror experience set in a forgotten shopping mall. Explore, investigate, and survive as reality twists into something far more sinister.

items.title: Darkness Has Eyes
items.short_description: Survive the dark in this tense atmospheric horror game. Face your fears and explore abandoned floors while searching for key items to escape the dark.

items.title: Dechamel Chess
items.short_description: Dechamel Chess is a variation on a classic chess game. The same rules apply with a few more caveats. Moats, peace times, close combats and a campaign are what makes this chess game unique and fun to play.

items.title: Chicken Miner Demo
items.short_description: 一款单人俯视角矿山经营游戏。 捕捉小鸡，并与它们一起开采矿物。 使用采集到的资源解锁更多研究、制作武器，打造更加高效的矿山。 和小鸡们一起发展你的矿山吧！

items.title: Foreign Rim Demo
items.short_description: A rich Turn-Based Strategy with deep mechanics, big armies and complex balance. Lead an expedition to explore the vast desert expanses. Play campaign, custom game, PvP, or create custom experiences with built-in scenarios and map editors!

items.title: The Order of Things
items.short_description: The Order of Things is a short first-person horror memory puzzle game. New objects appear one by one. Remember what was added, choose them in the correct order, and escape before your mistakes run out.

items.title: 101 Cats in Munich
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 11 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: 加入这场冒险，在精心打造的慕尼黑风景中，寻找101只小猫咪🐾的藏身之处。🏆赢取众多成就。你能找到多少只呢？😺快来抓紧时间！⏱️

items.title: 101 Cats in Sydney
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 11 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: 加入这场冒险，在精心打造的悉尼风景中，寻找101只小猫咪🐾的藏身之处。🏆赢取众多成就。你能找到多少只呢？😺快来抓紧时间！⏱️

items.title: Hidden Sheep Puzzle Demo
items.short_description: Can you find every sheep and solve the Sheep Puzzle? Looks simple. Isn’t.

items.title: Nightmares
items.short_description: Nightmares is a combination of a classic collectible card game and a roguelike deck builder. Race against the clock to defeat your opponent before your sanity runs out. Win or lose, you'll get the opportunity to upgrade your deck. Can you craft the ultimate deck for an undefeated run?

items.title: 魔導少女イバラ
items.short_description: "A true classic side-scrolling action game! Magical Girl Ibara, born here."

items.title: Dial Z to Zombie: Zombies Attack the Beach
items.short_description: Dial Z to Zombie is a retro-inspired old-school FPS where zombies have invaded the beach. Use ridiculous weapons, rescue survivors, discover secrets, and blast your way through a weird ’90s-inspired zombie apocalypse.

items.title: Rotary Knights Demo
items.short_description: A text-based RPG spanning the entire arc of WWI aviation. Fly 37 historical aircraft, survive dogfights against the Red Baron, manage your aerodrome on the Western Front, and make choices that determine whether your pilot lives to see the Armistice.

items.title: Fascist Demo
items.short_description: As National Guard, stand defiant against relentless hordes. Unleash righteous fury. Old Glory waves eternal and America endures because YOU fight!

items.title: Spitter
items.short_description: Your tongue is your engine. The table never stops. The pockets are waiting.

items.title: 盲心：伪装的幻想 Demo
items.short_description: 《盲心：伪装的幻想》是一款AVG游戏——不知何时，我平常的人生变得没那么平常了......那些只在网上所谓的恐怖故事里看到的伪人竟然出现在了现实，还没消化完这段消息，我的爱人林诗语敲响了我的门......

items.title: 极光 Demo
items.short_description: 《极光》是一个科幻风的fps类游戏，在游戏中，你将与艾诺一起逐步探寻自己的记忆，通过枪械，黑暗力量，智慧来应对出现的威胁或打通前进的道路，在最后找到前进的理由。

items.title: Escape Wheel
items.short_description: Escape Wheel is a 2D puzzler using time inversion mechanics. Solve half the puzzle while time moves forward, enter The Escape Wheel, and solve the other half while time moves in reverse. A whole new way to look at time travel and puzzle solving.

items.title: Fight or Flight
items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 156 篇用户评测中有 70% 为好评。
items.short_description: Battle Royale and Extraction that blends PvP and PvE, You are a operative that will drop into the infected region and attempt to recover artifacts and eradicate the infected. Each player is pitted against Zombies, Monsters and each other. Online or Single player for practice with bots!

items.title: Junkster
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 11 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: 《Junkster》是一款拥有出色建造机制的3D动作平台游戏。勇敢的小建筑机器人UM-13坠毁在一个危险的垃圾星球上。UM必须修理飞船并找回遗失的人类珍贵文物。

items.title: DreamRace
items.short_description: DreamRace is a high-speed arcade racing runner where you blast through 30 levels across six unique worlds.

items.title: 扑克迷阵
items.short_description: 在这款扑克牌回合制策略游戏中，你需要与电脑先后从棋盘上选取五张位置临近的牌，通过比较牌型判断胜负，赚取筹码。将每局游戏的筹码转化为得分，解锁更多游戏模式吧!

items.title: KNEE SLIDE
items.short_description: 一款通过膝盖滑行在宇宙彩虹赛道上飞驰的短篇计时竞速游戏。 灵活运用漂移与加速，在避免掉出赛道的同时挑战最快通关时间。 游戏共包含5个关卡，适合短时间内反复挑战。

items.title: Again：Loop
items.short_description: Find anomalies hidden within a repeating hallway. Miss one, or make the wrong choice, and everything resets back to the beginning.

items.title: ハコ入りユウシャ ポルックス
items.short_description: Charge ahead with “INVINCIBILITY”! A Unique 2D Action Game set in a Weird World, brought to life with Retro Pixel Graphics!

items.title: 喵喵便利店
items.short_description: 可以在你在娱乐、工作甚至是学习的时候让你放松的一款挂机游戏。它不会挡住你的区域，它还可以很方便的随意移动窗口，不会影响到你的工作区域，你需要做的只是在需要放松一下、喘口气的时候，拖拽一下商品，然后奖励一下猫猫就好了。

items.title: Astropath
items.short_description: Draw your path through the stars. Dodge asteroids, survive encounters, and chart a course across each level in this fast-paced skill-based game.

items.title: Ultimate Sportsball Championship Demo
items.short_description: Ultimate Sportsball Championship (USC) is the mixed sportsball game your mom warned you about. You are not ready for this. Keep scrolling.

items.title: Vegas Hold'Em: Ultimate Casino Hold'em Poker Collection With Strategy Trainer
items.short_description: The ultimate single-player casino poker collection. 7 Poker Hold'em variants vs the dealer, Live AI Strategy Advisor that runs fully offline, Hand Lab analyzer, step-by-step tutorials, up to 3 hands at once. No real money. One-time price — no microtransactions, no energy bars, no ads.

items.title: Waste Runner: Critical Waste
items.short_description: 扮演城市垃圾收集员，直面潜伏在街头的各种危险。游戏采用俯视等距视角，你需要穿梭于多个城市街区，收集、运输并安全处置垃圾。

items.title: Waste Runner: Critical Waste Demo
items.short_description: 扮演城市垃圾收集员，直面潜伏在街头的各种危险。游戏采用俯视等距视角，你需要穿梭于多个城市街区，收集、运输并安全处置垃圾。

items.title: I FORGOT TO TAKE THE CHICKEN OUT OF THE FREEZER
items.short_description: You forgot to defrost the chicken. Now there are zombies. Aim, shoot, sprint, and reload through a stormy graveyard in this single-player survival shooter, dodging a relentless boss named Um Fatima while reflecting on the dinner that could have been.

items.title: KILL LOOP Demo
items.short_description: 反弹！击杀！加速！这是一款极简高速动作游戏！在无尽的反弹和循环里不断杀戮，在极简的世界里感受击杀带来的快感吧！

items.title: Doom Party
items.short_description: Doom Party is a fast-paced parkour and mini-games experience featuring vertical challenges, obstacle gameplay, climbing mechanics, and stylized environments with more content coming soon.

items.title: Puzzle O´Matic
items.short_description: 探索舒适的小岛，拍摄可爱的动物和美丽的地方，并将每张照片变成手工拼图，您可以立即完成，也可以保存起来以后再拼。

items.title: Dungeons and Treasure 2 Demo
items.short_description: Dungeons and Treasure II is a voxel action roguelike for 1-4 players. Brave endless, scaling floors with 100+ items, buffs, and permanent unlocks. Explore procedural zones with unique bosses, secrets, and traps. Features full controller support and mid-run saves for desktop play.

items.title: Find Cats 7 Art & Alchemy Demo
items.short_description: 180只彩色猫咪散落在三幅中世纪画卷：挂满药瓶的炼金房、塞满油画的画家阁楼、繁花深处的哥特花园。每只都看得见但藏得隐蔽：花瓣背后、瓶罐阴影、油画角落……每只都有专属提示。27种喵声+4首BGM，治愈又考眼力。

items.title: Merge Hidden 合成寻物
items.short_description: 每一个隐藏物体都被一分为二！在精美制作的场景中找到两半、拼合还原，才是真正的「找到」。五大主题场景，脑洞大开的合成组合（草帽+雪人、盾牌+剑），简单上手，适合所有爱解谜的人。

items.title: 末日逃离Demo
items.short_description: 在崩塌的后末日世界中搜集资源、躲避怪物，并在黑暗吞噬一切之前成功撤离。死亡将失去你带出的所有物品。

items.title: 无效化 Demo
items.short_description: 温妮娅是疗养院里唯一的孩子，每天沉浸在自己的幻想世界中冒险。凯则是这里一位冷漠严谨的医生，负责治疗病人、诊断问题患者的病情。一个天真烂漫，一个理性实证，两人运行在截然不同的轨道上，却又彼此相互影响……

items.title: Hey Tom! Demo
items.short_description: Stranded on an abandoned island hunted by the terrifying creature Tom, you must fight, scavenge, and manipulate your environment to survive

items.title: Vibe or Dare
items.short_description: Vibe or Dare is a party card game where friends reveal truths, complete dares, vote on outcomes, and compete for the strongest vibe in the room.

items.title: LIMINAL ESCAPE
items.short_description: LIMINAL ESCAPE is a Backrooms co-op survival horror game for up to 4 players, where you and your friends will fight to escape from the unsettling, endless depths of Liminal space.

items.title: Roses In Concrete
items.short_description: Inspired by a famous poem from a legendary deceased American rapper, Roses In Concrete is an exercise in distilling a literary work into gameplay mechanics that reinforce its core message.

items.title: Cyber-Nanotech Horde Survivor
items.short_description: Defend the system core in this fast-paced cybernetic roguelite! Fight a self-merging digital virus, decrypt firewall nodes for powerful real-time subroutines, and defeat giant boss kernels. Spend credits on persistent hardware upgrades to survive the endless purge.

items.title: Obscuris
items.short_description: 以现代日本为背景的1–6人合作恐怖游戏。扮演日本女高中生，探索诡异地点（部分为程序生成），夜间收集Obscure，完成致命配额并在黎明前逃离。自定义角色。剧情模式尚未开放。

items.title: Gods' Gate Demo
items.short_description: Gods' Gate is a relentless isometric shooter where elite operatives plunge through ancient portals into procedurally generated mythological hellscapes. Survive escalating hordes, and extract before the Gate seals—leaving you trapped with the gods who want you dead. Solo or 4-player co-op.

items.title: Scratch your Luck Demo
items.short_description: Scratch tickets, upgrade your odds, and pay deadlines before you go broke.

items.title: 夜班护士模拟器 Demo
items.short_description: 在这款心理恐怖护士模拟器中存活30天。在执行日常医疗任务与严格的时间管理之间寻找平衡，同时躲避潜伏在黑暗病房中的恐怖异常。赚取薪水，控制你不断下降的理智值，在成为医院的下一个永久病人之前拼死逃离。

items.title: PNG BATTLE
items.short_description: 某一天，有人突发奇想。 "霸王龙和有智慧的自卸卡车打架，谁会赢？" 你那些荒诞又伟大的幻想，我们统统帮你实现。"PNG BATTLE"

items.title: Forge Clicker 2 Demo
items.short_description: Forge Clicker 2 is a pixel art idle clicker game where you manage your own forge. Tap to gather materials, craft weapons through a forging minigame, sell your creations, and unlock stronger materials, upgrades, and new blades.

items.title: oooÖ
items.short_description: 《oooÖ》是一款闯关冒险解谜游戏。你将从死亡中醒来，化身为一只独特的毛毛虫。 探索趣味关卡，体会倒霉小夫的遭遇，是黄泉路上走一趟还是重生校园奇遇！ 你一无所知，但本能告诉你——逃离这里！

items.title: 妖刀传 Demo
items.short_description: 妖刀现，血雨落…… 人人都知道的童谣传唱了百年， 而如今，妖星祸起，妖刀于名剑会现身…… 这摄人心魄的嗜血之刃，又将掀起何等的腥风血雨呢？

items.title: Pixmox
items.short_description: Collect unique pets, build powerful teams, and unleash strategic Match-3 combos to defeat epic bosses. Unlock new companions, strengthen your roster, and discover endless battle synergies on your adventure.

items.title: Wall Brawl Demo
items.short_description: Hold the line! Team up in this tactical multiplayer castle‑brawler where players raise fortresses, set up defenses, and smash through enemy strongholds with physics‑driven destruction. Heroic last stands! Questionable tactics! Bricks moving at unsafe speeds!

items.title: Who Clicked My Bones Demo
items.short_description: Who Clicked My Bones? is short Incremental Game about ruling a massive amount of skeleton army to sacrifice in order to Summon Lich King. Upgrade your skeleton in Skill Tree. The Game is designed to be finished in 4 hour playtime.

items.title: Whale Cleaner Demo
items.short_description: 准备好迎接海底最硬核的保洁工作了吗？接管深海清洗站，为脏兮兮的鲸鱼、海豚和其他神秘巨兽提供终极清洁服务！在这款极度解压且充满氛围感的清洁模拟游戏中，你需要使用贝壳刮刀、海绵等奇特工具，清理厚重的淤泥、远古海藻和危险的水母。收集隐藏在污垢中的红宝石蟹来升级装备。顶住黑心资本家“钳老板”的压力，努力将客户洗得闪闪发光！沉浸在独特的生物工业世界里，洗净千年的污垢，发掘意想不到的深海秘宝。

items.title: 哇咔纳传说
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 37 篇用户评测中有 59% 为好评。
items.short_description: 《哇咔纳传说》是一款充满奇幻与挑战的童话风动作冒险游戏，带你踏入神秘广阔的童话大陆。在这里你将面对各种各样的怪物和场景，灵活运用你的魔法技能来对抗这些敌人。最终在追寻生命的真谛、家庭纽带和自我认知的探索中，收获独一无二的心灵体验。

items.title: Aaron Drake: Ace Detective Demo
items.short_description: Become Aaron Drake and experience the thrill of the hunt as you interrogate suspects, spot contradictions, and corner killers across three murder cases — alongside a rookie partner who is trying her very best.

items.title: Woke Up In a Dark Nightmare Demo
items.short_description: You fell asleep in your own bed but woke up in a dark nightmare. Explore a shifting house haunted by paranormal activity, uncover disturbing secrets and uncover the truth behind your arrival.

items.title: BURNTCRUST Demo
items.short_description: Drive across randomly generated galaxies, deliver pizza, upgrade your ship, and plan your route to avoid hostiles. Or get drunk, gamble away your life savings, and crash full speed into an asteroid field. I won't judge.

items.title: ReStory: Chill Electronic Repairs Demo
items.short_description: 在2005年左右的东京开一间古朴的电子产品维修店，通过认真修复标志性的电子游戏主机、手机、音乐播放器及其他怀旧设备来扩大经营。与顾客交谈，聆听他们的故事，见证你的决定将如何影响他们的人生以及你的店铺的发展。

items.title: The Adventure of Spyke Demo
items.short_description: Join Spyke where the worst day of his life suddenly takes a turn and becomes an epic adventure. Solve challenging puzzles, use mystical tools, and fight robots, venom-spitting organ harvesters, terrifying creatures, and much more in this low-poly, top-down, action RPG puzzler.

items.title: 猫咪列车长 Demo
items.short_description: 《猫咪列车长》是一款 2D 像素风的暖心系桌面放置游戏，让你的屏幕化身为会动的超可爱猫咪乐园！

items.title: 我的修仙日志 Cultivation Journal
items.review_summary: 差评 此游戏的 17 篇用户评测中有 11% 为好评。
items.short_description: 《我的修仙日志》是一款融合了文字MUD美学与深度修仙模拟的挂机游戏。你将扮演一介凡人，从炼气期踏上漫漫仙途，在挂机中积累修为、炼制丹药、锻造法宝，在心魔幻境中突破境界，最终渡劫飞升。游戏拥有超过数百段心魔叙事的突破系统、百余本可参悟的功法、完善的炼丹炼器体系，以及独创的“修仙书架”功能——让你在修炼之余，读一本小说，静待道成。

items.title: PS Maker Demo
items.short_description: Create 2D top-down story-driven exploration games without writing any code! PS Maker lets you build maps, add characters, write dialogue, set up puzzles, and trigger cutscenes to tell your story. Once it's ready, share your games instantly with friends!

items.title: Dungeons And Animals Demo
items.short_description: Dive into dungeons in a 1–6 player co-op souls-like experience, gather resources, craft powerful gear, and survive in a world where risk determines everything.

items.title: snaze Demo
items.short_description: Snaze is a snake game. Eat the green dots and go to next level.

items.title: Light From Within Demo
items.short_description: Light From Within is a top-down action-adventure focused on exploration, dungeon crawling, and discovery. Traverse a handcrafted world, solve puzzles, uncover hidden paths, and collect relics that expand your abilities, boost your stats, and alter how you interact with the environment.

items.title: 放置模拟国
items.short_description: 《放置模拟国》是一款国家模拟类放置游戏，您可以轻松的获得各类资源，并使用获得的资源进行国家养成，最后实现统一天下的目的。

items.title: Royal Signal : The Prince’s 5 Days Demo
items.short_description: Four princesses gather before the Crown Prince of the mightiest kingdom — you. Wield your royal gift — Telepathy — to peer into their hidden hearts. Behind every dazzling smile, each princess hides her own truth. Five days. See past the masks and choose the one to stand by your side.

items.title: RAX
items.short_description: RAX 是一款关于光路、逻辑与模块化构建的益智沙盒游戏。放置并旋转不同光学元件，控制光线的方向、颜色和时序，点亮目标，并将复杂结构封装成可复用的蓝图芯片。 这是一款基于网格的逻辑解谜游戏，核心操作是选择、放置、旋转和组合光学元件。玩家通过反射、分光、合色、延迟、阻断和条件触发来构建稳定的光路。随着谜题推进，游戏从直观的路径规划逐渐扩展到信号时序、状态保持和芯片封装，主要吸引力在于用简单规则搭建出复杂而可复用的系统。

items.title: 盛夏离与合 试用版
items.short_description: 毕业自驾游？不，是「心动修罗场」！ 《盛夏离与合》是现象级互动影像系列《完蛋！我被美女包围了！》IP的全新篇章。本次我们将填补“完蛋宇宙”时间线上的关键一块，带你回到那个承前启后、充满无限可能的毕业季，体验一段关于成长、抉择与命运交织的动人故事。 这段承前启后的夏日篇章，都会因你每一次的抉择，导向独一无二的盛夏结局。

items.title: 真弓-Mayumi-
items.short_description: This is a Japanese horror game that features a woman who works at a hospital as the main character.

items.title: The Big Owl Night
items.short_description: Survive a chaotic night in São Paulo with zombies, bosses and cursed upgrades in a fast-paced top-down roguelite. Collect weapons, trigger strange synergies, visit odd merchants and fight until the Big Owl lets you see another sunrise.

items.title: Astral Boost Demo
items.short_description: Astral Boost is a fast-paced endless runner where players build and maintain momentum by striking clouds and chaining boosts together. Set against vibrant skies and accompanied by an energetic soundtrack, the objective is to travel as high as possible and achieve the highest score you can.

items.title: Gingerbread Wonderland Demo
items.short_description: Decorate your own gingerbread cookies, and organize your scene. And share it with your friends. How about making my own scene this Christmas ?

items.title: 玛丽编辑器
items.short_description: 一款功能强大的玛丽机主题编辑器与游戏平台，让您自由定制主题图标、配色、音效与玩法规则，打造专属的街机体验。

items.title: Volcano Logistics Demo
items.short_description: 一款令人满足的第一人称渐进式物理游戏，玩家需经营废弃物处理厂，并为饥饿的火山提供燃料。赚取灵魂球并解锁地狱级升级。扩展你的平台，焚烧并摧毁各类物体。为恶魔上司效力，并揭开可疑货物背后的黑暗真相

items.title: 灰度决策 Demo
items.short_description: 程序员救下一名老道，获得残破古籍《万符真解》。你惊讶发现——制符和开发软件一样，不过是平衡各项参数。于是你开了家“赛博符箓”公司，研发数字灵符，在道德与暴利之间反复横跳。 是坚守正道，还是拥抱灰色？每一次选择，都将改变公司的命运。

items.title: 黑帆王座·Galactic Loadout Demo
items.short_description: 在《黑帆王座·Galactic Loadout》中，堆叠离谱联武器，赌出逆天搭配，让战舰战力无限膨胀。每一次选择都在失控边缘狂飙——直到你碾碎整片星海。

items.title: Gastova: The Witches of Arkana
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 30 篇用户评测中有 90% 为好评。
items.short_description: 《女巫史诗》是一款轻松愉快的2D平台冒险遊戏。作为阿尔卡那的守护魔女，加斯托娃必须维持魔法的平衡、解开与泉源守护者相关的谜团、揭开隐藏的真相，并在为时已晚之前，从邪恶势力手中守护这个世界的未来……

items.title: Hunt And Peck Demo
items.short_description: Turn your index fingers into the brave Eagle Brothers! 'Hunt & Peck' is a typing defense game where you don't type words—you strike keys. Smash the specific keys where enemies appear with speed and precision to defend the cyber world.

items.title: 桌面蚂蚁 Demo
items.short_description: 在电脑桌面模拟喂养蚂蚁，搬运食物。还原现实中观察蚂蚁的体验，还可以投喂不同食物以及使用各种道具捉弄它们。平时它们在屏幕上四处觅食，时刻陪伴你并且不会影响你的工作。

items.title: Toxic Trains Demo
items.short_description: Toxic Trains is a strategy simulation game about optimizing rail routes. Build tracks to transport passenger and freight trains to their destinations. Choose upgrades to modify the land and your network. Switch tracks to avoid collisions and spills. Can you keep the trains from exploding?

items.title: Slice To Meet You Demo
items.short_description: A cozy idle incremental game about the satisfying rhythm of chopping ingredients. Unlock new produce, upgrade your knives, and grow your earnings — all at your own pace, with no pressure and no timers.

items.title: ALARIC
items.short_description: May your wrath conquer the cursed beings and save the land. Fight like hell and avenge your father. Explore a giant castle filled with monsters and get stronger to withstand the forces of hell in this boomershooter, metroidvania adventure.

items.title: Idle Knight
items.short_description: Idle Knight turns every click, keystroke, and controller input into XP. Level up your warrior, build your stats, fight in ranked duels, conquer dungeons, join guilds, and crush seasonal events all from your desktop.

items.title: Good Hands Demo
items.short_description: In Good Hands, join Nia as she helps her neighbor Aunty Zubeida tidy up a tangled garden. Tend, sort, and restore calm in this cozy puzzle about care and connection. Unwind with uniquely crafted puzzles, made for anyone who finds joy in gardens.

items.title: Life in Tudorofka
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 16 篇用户评测中有 87% 为好评。
items.short_description: Life in Tudorofka is a game where you, find a rusty broken junk, restore the junk, buy parts for the junk, build your car, work and enjoy your life at country

items.title: My Donut
items.short_description: Unleash your imagination in a world of sweets! Create your dream donuts from shaping the dough to decorating with colorful toppings. Experience a relaxing creative journey focused on making and sharing your unique masterpieces.

items.title: The Wild Demo
items.short_description: Step into the wild, the untamed world of Earth, where you'll take control of a wide variety of animals. Survive the harsh environment, hunt, forage, breed and fight through an ever changing ecosystem.

items.title: Broken Crown
items.short_description: Broken Crown is a fantasy RTS where you build a settlement, gather resources, research powerful upgrades, and command hundreds of units in formation-based battles. Advance troops through five visual tiers, preserve Bronze-to-Gold veterans, and conquer tactical maps shaped by Fog of War.

items.title: Mage Madness Demo
items.short_description: Mage Madness is a first person multiplayer party game where mages compete in spell-fueled minigames. Cast spells, duke it out in chaotic minigames, and settle grudges. Play quick rounds in Playlist Mode or go all in with Block Party where every point earned earned fuels your power.

items.title: Echoes In Static Demo
items.short_description: An animatronic horror experience

items.title: Endless Roll Demo
items.short_description: Your dice are your health in this endless survival roguelite. Pick a lane, manage wounds and corruption, draft omens, climb the leaderboard, and push for one more floor.

items.title: Elacoria Demo
items.short_description: Explore an endless open world — vast in width, length, and depth — filled with mysteries to uncover. Join up to 8 friends to survive, farm, mine, build, and fight together in a living world with day-night cycles, seasons, and dynamic weather.

items.title: Stone to Stove Demo
items.short_description: 白天收集资源，服务他人赚取金钱；夜晚购买防御塔，保卫基地。优化你的定居点，承担风险以获取更多利润，每天抵御日益艰难的攻击，这将为你带来丰厚的回报。

items.title: Through Ash
items.short_description: Through Ash is a first-person tragedy where you control a logistics rover from a failing bunker. You never leave the bunker, only guide the rover via terminals. As mistakes mount, the rover’s “critical package” reveals a deeply personal truth.

items.title: Planet Arcade Demo
items.short_description: A light-hearted, casual adventure game in the style of a retro RPG. In place of traditional battles, key plot points are advanced through minigames, some of which are stylistic tributes to classic arcade games.

items.title: Autotelic
items.short_description: mess about with a unique array of tools, items and characters in a stylized homemade game engine.

items.title: Shoot Until You Rest Demo
items.short_description: Shoot Until You Rest is an arena-shooter rogue-lite where you can choose from a large range of weapons and other gear to fight your enemies. Survive waves, fight powerfull bosses and get rewarded with new upgrades and characters(yes you can play the bosses).

items.title: Schedule Store Simulator Demo
items.short_description: 从小毒贩一路崛起为令人畏惧的毒枭，在 Hyland Point 的黑暗地下世界中制造并分销毒品。 通过购置物业、经营业务、雇佣员工并掌控街头来壮大你的帝国。

items.title: Play and Learn English
items.short_description: 先让你开口说,再让你说得更好。仅用1000个单词,让你的日常英语流利起来。在故事驱动的RPG中,麦克风与你同在,游戏会倾听。完全离线,无订阅。

items.title: 《美少女旅馆：可爱即是正义，但正义需要处刑》
items.short_description: 一间神秘的旅馆，一群彼此怀疑的美少女，一场无法停止的猎杀游戏。在谎言与处刑之间，找出真正的狼人，每一个选择，都会改写她们的结局。

items.title: lone.AI Demo
items.short_description: lone.AI is a space RPG roguelite. With challenging, relentless gameplay, each run has the potential to boost your ship's power, speed, and more. As a lone AI, fight your way through the solar system and uncover the secret behind the ZOSMA, an alien race that holds power over the system.

items.title: With A Heavy Heart Demo
items.short_description: A cozy 2D platformer on what it means to truly live, laugh, learn, and lift someone up

items.title: Mini Lucy
items.short_description: A move. A shared room. And suddenly... everything feels huge. Lucy wakes up feeling tiny in her own room. Explore your surroundings as you’ve never seen them before, collect crystal shards, and return to your normal size with the help of Bob, a mysterious little magical creature.

items.title: Watamari Part2 - A Fake Marriage? Demo
items.short_description: 化身“恋之天使”，引导少女们走向爱情的百合游戏。 在悉心照料主人的身心之余，倾听她们的心声，推动故事前进。 加油吧，小天使——你的选择，或许将改变她们的命运。

items.title: Sneaky Bimbuls
items.short_description: One team hides among a crowd of NPCs. The other has to figure out who's a player before the map gets sabotaged. A chaotic local party game for 2-8 players on a shared screen.

items.title: 五七之桐：通向首相之路 Demo
items.short_description: 这是一款以经济泡沫破裂后的大不况事件为背景的政治模拟文字冒险游戏。您将扮演新当选的县知事折木一马，在故事中利用有限的预算解决县内经济、安全与福祉的诸多问题，并妥善处理议会政党与政府成员间的关系。最终一步步迈向总理大臣的宝座。

items.title: Eightfold Blocks Demo
items.short_description: Rotate, place, and rethink every block in a focused 8x8 puzzle game. Solve 1,000 spatial boards, keep finished solutions visible, reset freely, and use optional hints when one stubborn piece refuses to fit.

items.title: SkateFPS Demo
items.short_description: When the system hates you, hate the system! Experimental FPS about shooting magic from your hands with a skateboard + text adventure with multiple endings about being cursed in your own land.

items.title: 蒙古之岚 剧本1：崇正学堂篇 Demo
items.short_description: 内蒙古喀喇沁的崇正学堂，1900年代。在真实历史人物交错的校园里，通过累积少女萨仁的选择见证五段真结局——一部史实视觉小说。收录约 7 万字剧本、30项成就、传统蒙古文竖排显示。

items.title: ArmOut
items.short_description: ArmOut is an old slot machine. It just sits there doing nothing... However, it might spin whenever you press a key with chosen amount of credits. Punch that keyboard to earn those credits!!!

items.title: Welcome Demon Demo
items.short_description: Judge otherworldly creatures, determine their sentences, and assign them to the correct dungeons using your rulebook. Keep Tempo above zero and Chaos below 100 as you struggle to survive 666 hours as the prison’s new warden.

items.title: Backburner
items.short_description: Cook, serve, and manage your food truck while exploring a handcrafted open world. Upgrade your equipment, unlock new recipes, and turn your small food truck into a thriving business.

items.title: Break The Chain
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 23 篇用户评测中有 52% 为好评。
items.short_description: You are bound by a chain — every step matters. Break the Chain is a physics-based solo and co-op puzzle game where precision, timing, and teamwork are everything. One mistake can pull everyone down. Fall, restart, and fight your way to freedom.

items.title: The Crimson Contract Demo
items.short_description: Every contract pays. Some cost what’s left of your humanity.

items.title: Wing Walker Demo
items.short_description: 在这款快节奏、考验技巧的平台游戏中，你需要奔跑、跳跃，并在移动的飞机上生存下来。你需要在飞机之间跳跃，掌握精准的时机，并努力在速度和混乱程度不断增加的情况下保持平衡，因为你知道，一个错误就会让你坠落。

items.title: Bit Mine Clicker
items.short_description: Bit-Mine Clicker is an incremental mining game where you click to earn BIT, build automatic miners, upgrade your grid, react to changing market prices, and defend your base. Catch helpful bonuses, avoid dangerous traps, unlock talents, and turn a single coin into a powerful BIT empire

items.title: Grapixo Arte em Guerra Demo
items.short_description: Scratch in a 2.5D world that blends hip hop aesthetics with action/platforming, where urban art has come to life. Explore dynamic environments, face cleaning robots, and uncover secrets of this vibrant world as you reclaim your identity in this intense and colorful adventure.

items.title: A DAY TO REMEMBER
items.short_description: Play as aino, she has secret feelings for her childhood friend name Rain, can she possibly confess her feelings to rain before the day ends or will it be to late and will she lose her childhood friend Rain forever?

items.title: Birds of War Demo
items.short_description: You are a bird. You have a nest. Other birds want your eggs. Birds of War is a team-based aerial PvP game. Raid nests, steal eggs, fight beak-to-beak in fast, chaotic matches built around flight and combat. Your mic is always hot. Your enemies can hear you. Plan accordingly.

items.title: More Deaths, More Fun (Lie) Demo
items.short_description: More Deaths, More Fun (Lie) is a brutal 2D platformer where every death makes the game harder. Face evolving levels, precise challenges, and climb the global leaderboard. Fail fast, adapt faster - or lose your sanity trying.

items.title: Echo Core Demo
items.short_description: Fight the machines. Survive the ruins. Uncover the truth. Echo Core is a top-down sci-fi action-adventure where you awaken in a forgotten underground facility. Explore awe-inducing locations, battle hostile machines, and uncover the truth of this place across chapters.

items.title: The Disappearance of Emily Crowe Demo
items.short_description: 你的妹妹15年前失踪了。你回来了，带走她的东西还在。第一人称心理恐怖，无战斗。每个实体有独特的猎杀方式，设法生存。重温她的记忆。连接真实手机来探测并面对威胁。

items.title: LampMan! Demo
items.short_description: LampMan! is a 2d action-platformer featuring three playable characters you can switch between at any time. Master their abilities, conquer vibrant levels, and restore light to LampWorld!

items.title: Eternal Exodus
items.short_description: 一款以来世为舞台的捕怪 RPG。在这场探讨深刻哲学与形而上学主题的剧情向冒险中，捕捉并融合神话生物，踏上将来世从暴政统治中解放出来的旅程。

items.title: The Refuge Demo
items.short_description: Serve the A.R.C organization. Infiltrate infested zones, complete contracts, and extract with your resources. Upgrade your facilities and complete quests to unlock new services. An intense PvE extraction where the difficulty increases with your ambitions.

items.title: KAON : Fragmented Core Demo
items.short_description: KAON: Fragmented Core is a 2D action-platformer with a metroidvania feel. You play as Kaon, an android awakened in a world where no one lives anymore, neither humans nor animals. Mostly what’s left is plants, ruins, and robots, a good chunk of them turned hostile

items.title: Aghia Demo
items.short_description: The Dark Voievode has unleashed his beasts to violate your homeland. Eradicate these creatures from the face of the Earth as you make your way across the country in this ’90s-inspired FPS.

items.title: Cheese Stack
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 19 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: Cheese Stack is a cozy puzzle game where you need to arrange falling pieces of cheese into perfect rows. Simple rules, delicious graphics, upbeat music, and a highscore table you'll be tempted to beat. It's the perfect way to unwind for 5 minutes or get lost in the game for an hour.

items.title: 1 AM MOSCOW TIME Demo
items.short_description: A 2D adventure about rescuing magical creatures in Moscow and the role of a design bureau employee in this whole story.

items.title: Clawless Coin Demo
items.short_description: 经营您自己的抓娃娃机帝国，收集奖杯毛绒玩具，解锁升级，并在这款温馨的街机放置游戏中获得声望以赚取巨额利润。

items.title: 暗神话:露西 Demo
items.short_description: 中世纪一处废弃城市出现了很多变异僵尸,之前军队在这里研发过毒气.上级怕僵尸入侵到周边的城市,所以派露西过来探查情况,最好能够消灭所有变异僵尸.上级给了露西6把高科技武器,但这里的僵尸实在太多了,露西可能需要在这里呆很久,准备好,任务开始!

items.title: Please, Spin Demo
items.short_description: 在这款赌上性命的“命运轮盘”Roguelike游戏中，转动轮盘决定生死！自定义你的轮盘，搜寻能打破游戏平衡的遗物，在疯狂的小游戏中求生。智取暗箱操作的Boss，击败疯狂的主持人，活着逃离这场死亡直播！

items.title: Kick Demo
items.short_description: 《Kick》是一段充满怀旧情怀的旅程，你在上学的路上不断磨练自己的足球技巧，穿越充满独特挑战的关卡。你准备好大显身手了吗？

items.title: The Calling Past. Demo
items.short_description: 杰布生活艰难，决定回到故乡。想在亲友身边逃避坏念头，却开始做噩梦——不仅睡梦中，醒来也纠缠他。找到并了解杰布噩梦的源头。

items.title: Football Pitch And Arcade Simulator Demo
items.short_description: 经营您自己的五人制足球场和街机中心！升级设施，吸引顾客，打造您的娱乐帝国。

items.title: Arcany Demo
items.short_description: Arcany is a cozy persistent online world set in the mysterious Realm of Gravenmoor. Train skills, explore a magical land, craft powerful items, and uncover the story behind the forgotten cataclysme.

items.title: Nekopedia: Find Her Tail Demo
items.short_description: 与猫娘们一起踏上旅程，在温馨多彩的地点寻找隐藏的猫咪。阅读猫娘百科，与她们交谈，深入了解猫娘及其种类，也许会发现超出你预期的事情。每位猫娘都有自己独特的魅力和个人故事。

items.title: 炼金秘术 Demo
items.short_description: 《炼金秘术》作为一款解谜叙事类游戏，你将扮演一位重返故乡的炼金公会书记员，并在一些机缘巧合下临时成为了一名值岗炼金师。被赶鸭上架的你不得不回忆起过去习得的炼金术知识来解决本地居民的需求，并与自己的同伴们在这个逐渐崩溃的世界中生存下去。

items.title: A.V.E.N.A Demo
items.short_description: Pilot disposable combat drones through the Primal Portal in a sci-fi action roguelike. Customize your drone, fight through various missions, recover research data and alien technology to enhance your drone setup for the next session.

items.title: FLESHBREAK Demo
items.short_description: A story-driven survival visual novel inspired by SCP-610. Face a flesh-spreading outbreak, make brutal moral choices, protect the people you can’t let go of, and uncover the terrifying truth behind the disease.

items.title: Vermin Protocol - Demo
items.short_description: Take on pest control contracts and hunt infestations across abandoned warehouses, barns, and other contaminated locations Track, eliminate, and contain the vermin before they spread.

potential_items.title: Gloria Victis: Medieval MMORPG
potential_items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 754 篇用户评测中有 68% 为好评。 此产品的总体评价是基于您的偏好用以您语言撰写的评测计算得出的。
potential_items.short_description: 《Gloria Victis》是一款侧重真实性的开放世界大型多人在线角色扮演游戏，背景设定为略带魔幻风格的中世纪。本游戏战斗系统无目标锁定机制，依赖玩家操作，玩家可在开放式的PVP战斗中争夺领土控制权。游戏的制造系统有深度而无所不包，经济系统由玩家主导，剧情成熟而宏大，画面写实而绚丽，向玩家呈现沉浸式的游戏体验。 游戏有两大阵营：居住在大草原上的自豪的中土人，以及住在寒冷北方又复仇心切的伊斯米尔人。玩家将选择一方加入，然后奔赴战场！

potential_items.title: Backrooms Lost Runners
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 68 篇用户评测中有 89% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: Backrooms Lost Runners 是一款合作生存恐怖游戏，拥有团队玩法、语音反应 AI 和沉浸式谜题。这不是“散步模拟器”：探索边缘空间，智胜实体，并记住——即使是耳语也可能暴露你。

potential_items.title: Prologue: Go Wayback!
potential_items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 293 篇用户评测中有 69% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: Prologue: Go Wayback! is a single-player open-world emergent survival roguelike where every journey is unique. Traverse a new wilderness that is generated for you every time you play. Chart your path, overcome the elements, and write your own story of exploration.

potential_items.title: SWAPMEAT
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 140 篇用户评测中有 90% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: Rip through hostile alien worlds, harvest mutant body parts mid-combat, and adapt faster than your enemies. Every alien you harvest gives you new body parts with unique powers, like triple-jump legs, turret-dropping torsos, grenade-launching turkey heads. Steal, swap, survive.

potential_items.title: Burger Bots Inc.
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 90 篇用户评测中有 93% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: An online co-op burger flipping game with scary and strange customers that you shouldn't anger.

potential_items.title: 我与你共度的七日
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 156 篇用户评测中有 94% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 与囚禁自己的迷之少女，在陌生的房间中共度七日。

potential_items.title: 太吾绘卷：天幕心帷
potential_items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 48,725 篇用户评测中有 70% 为好评。 此产品的总体评价是基于您的偏好用以您语言撰写的评测计算得出的。
potential_items.short_description: 《太吾绘卷》是一款以神话和武侠为题材的独立游戏。玩家将扮演神秘的“太吾氏传人”，在以古代中华神州为背景的架空世界中，通过一代又一代传人的努力和牺牲，最终击败强大的宿敌，决定人世的命运。

potential_items.title: Icaria
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 57 篇用户评测中有 91% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: Icaria is a robot colony builder where everything can be programmed. Build factories, design logistic networks, terraform the landscape, and explore an unknown alien world.

potential_items.title: City Car Driving 2.0
potential_items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 426 篇用户评测中有 58% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: City Car Driving 2.0 is a driving simulator designed to help novice drivers master driving in a setting as close to reality as possible.

potential_items.title: COPA CITY
potential_items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 87 篇用户评测中有 57% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: COPA CITY《足球大亨》 ：首款让你化身顶级足球赛事组织者的游戏。不是教练，也不是球员，而是幕后全局的掌控者。你的荣耀之路，从哨声未响时就已开启！

potential_items.title: Fight or Flight
potential_items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 156 篇用户评测中有 70% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: Battle Royale and Extraction that blends PvP and PvE, You are a operative that will drop into the infected region and attempt to recover artifacts and eradicate the infected. Each player is pitted against Zombies, Monsters and each other. Online or Single player for practice with bots!

potential_items.title: MOLE
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 469 篇用户评测中有 97% 为好评。
